headline: Jim Cramer Says McCormick “Is Still Reeling From Their Deal to Buy Unilever’s Food Business”
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed as he said that the Iran peace negotiations could trigger an oil glut, cool inflation, and pull interest rates down. Cramer expects to hear a Unilever deal justification from the management, as he remarked: Also, on Thursday, we hear from McCormick. This is […]
